arts.ttl: WATCH: Barcelona strike early against Real Betis as Gavi nets second goal of 2025
arts.sum: Barcelona will be eyeing further cup success in the Copa del Rey, and they are on course to reach the quarter-finals after taking an early lead in their last 16 clash against Real Betis.
